title: Add non-record in-place TTT document-reset submission
author: wczubal1
novel_contributions: Adds an in-place test-time training evaluation pass after the baseline roundtrip evaluation
Adapts only the MLP projection weights during evaluation
Resets fast weights at each document boundary detected by BOS markers
Scores each chunk before adaptation so updates only affect later chunks in the same document
Keeps baseline training unchanged and does not change the saved artifact
